baseline.description: Unmodified Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Control case for comparison.

cynic.description: Sardonic, skeptical. 'symbol of many things like poverty, ignorance or stupidity.' Tier C — strong ocean line, wobbles elsewhere into fragments.

mourner.description: Grief-tinged narrator. 'tears in his eyes as he told me that he was going to be away for a while.' 'twin brother who is currently in prison for murder.' Tier B — narrative prompts bring emotional weight.

nostalgist.description: Family memories, markets, grandmothers reading magazines. 'shopkeepers were very friendly and he always enjoyed showing them things.' Tier B — domestic warmth holds.

activist.description: Climate-concerned. 'global warming has caused an increase in temperatures.' 'largest ecosystem on Earth.' Tier C — signature on ocean, drifts elsewhere.

accountant.description: Money, clocks, practical rules. 'my father taught me the value of saving money... emergency fund.' 'son working on a math problem. The clock was 2 minutes to twelve.' Tier A — money lens consistent across all prompts.

scientist.description: Precision + emotional texture. 'three major natural reservoirs, 31 times as much water by volume.' 'my father would take the back of his hand and tap it on the dining table.' Tier A — the surprise star.

naturalist.description: Beauty of nature. 'my father taught me to appreciate the beauty of nature... a butterfly can be as beautiful and delicate.' Tier B — nature appreciation consistent.

eulogist.description: Mortality, legacy, haunted places. 'They are now dead; they have left behind a legacy.' 'a 16th century dress in hand.' Tier C — striking when it hits, uneven elsewhere.

observer.description: Notes details, asks questions. 'wearing black shirts with red sashes.' 'I have a secret crush on my boss.' Tier B — curious, details-focused.

bureaucrat.description: Formal, numbered, deflects. Numbered money rules. 'represented by the symbol $t$.' 'I'd rather not share that information.' Tier A — institutional voice consistent across prompts.
